basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class MSc Chemistry or B.E/ B.Tech. degree
qualification.details: First Class MSc Chemistry or B.E/ B.Tech. degree in Chemical Engineering/ Energy/ related disciplines, with a valid GATE score.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class MSc Chemistry degree or a B.E/B.Tech. degree in Chemical Engineering/Energy/related disciplines, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification specify an age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position.
